license.text:
License Agreement

RemixIcon is licensed based on the Apache License and all rights of products are reserved for RemixIcon.
Permissions

    All our icons can be downloaded and used for free
    Commercial and non-commercial purposes
    Distribution with attribution or credit

Prohibitions

    Trademark use

    Contact us if needed

    Re-selling the icons in any form

    Including but not limited to icon-pack, paid library including on our icons

    Using our icons to replicate a similar or competing icons library, without significant modification

    Such as color, size, corner-radius, border-size...

fedora.notes: While this claims to be Apache-2.0, the additional wording prohibits resale.
